info.description: Use these REST APIs for performing operations on API entity and their Operations associated with your Azure API Management deployment.
info.title: ApiManagementClient

get.description: Lists all APIs of the API Management service instance.

parameters.description: The name of the resource group.
parameters.name: resourceGroupName

parameters.description: The name of the API Management service.
parameters.name: serviceName

parameters.description: |   Field     |     Usage     |     Supported operators     |     Supported functions     |</br>|-------------|-------------|-------------|-------------|</br>| name | filter | ge, le, eq, ne, gt, lt | substringof, contains, startswith, endswith | </br>| displayName | filter | ge, le, eq, ne, gt, lt | substringof, contains, startswith, endswith | </br>| description | filter | ge, le, eq, ne, gt, lt | substringof, contains, startswith, endswith | </br>| serviceUrl | filter | ge, le, eq, ne, gt, lt | substringof, contains, startswith, endswith | </br>| path | filter | ge, le, eq, ne, gt, lt | substringof, contains, startswith, endswith | </br>

parameters.description: Number of records to return.
parameters.name: $top

parameters.description: Number of records to skip.
parameters.name: $skip

parameters.description: Include tags in the response.
parameters.name: tags

parameters.description: Include full ApiVersionSet resource in response
parameters.name: expandApiVersionSet

parameters.description: Version of the API to be used with the client request.
parameters.name: api-version

parameters.description: Subscription credentials which uniquely identify Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
parameters.name: subscriptionId

type.description: Resource type for API Management resource.

apiRevision.description: Describes the Revision of the Api. If no value is provided, default revision 1 is created

apiVersion.description: Indicates the Version identifier of the API if the API is versioned

apiVersionSetId.description: A resource identifier for the related ApiVersionSet.

bearerTokenSendingMethods.description: How to send token to the server.

items.description: Form of an authorization grant, which the client uses to request the access token.

values.description: Access token will be transmitted in the Authorization header using Bearer schema
Access token will be transmitted as query parameters.

description.description: Description of the API. May include HTML formatting tags.

isCurrent.description: Indicates if API revision is current api revision.

isOnline.description: Indicates if API revision is accessible via the gateway.

query.description: Subscription key query string parameter name.

subscriptionRequired.description: Specifies whether an API or Product subscription is required for accessing the API.

apiVersionSet.description: An API Version Set contains the common configuration for a set of API Versions relating

id.description: Identifier for existing API Version Set. Omit this value to create a new Version Set.

name.description: The display Name of the API Version Set.

versionHeaderName.description: Name of HTTP header parameter that indicates the API Version if versioningScheme is set to `header`.

versionQueryName.description: Name of query parameter that indicates the API Version if versioningScheme is set to `query`.

versioningScheme.description: An value that determines where the API Version identifer will be located in a HTTP request.

displayName.description: API name. Must be 1 to 300 characters long.

path.description: Relative URL uniquely identifying this API and all of its resource paths within the API Management service instance. It is appended to the API endpoint base URL specified during the service instance creation to form a public URL for this API.

protocols.description: Describes on which protocols the operations in this API can be invoked.

serviceUrl.description: Absolute URL of the backend service implementing this API. Cannot be more than 2000 characters long.

sourceApiId.description: API identifier of the source API.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

code.description: Service-defined error code. This code serves as a sub-status for the HTTP error code specified in the response.

details.description: The list of invalid fields send in request, in case of validation error.

code.description: Property level error code.

properties.description: A sample API that uses a petstore as an example to demonstrate features in the swagger-2.0 specification

apiType.description:
Type of Api to create. 
 * `http` creates a SOAP to REST API 
 * `soap` creates a SOAP pass-through API .

values.description: Imports a SOAP API having a RESTful front end.
values.name: SoapToRest

values.description: Imports the Soap API having a SOAP front end.
values.name: SoapPassThrough

format.description: Format of the Content in which the API is getting imported.

values.description: The contents are inline and Content type is a WADL document.
The WADL document is hosted on a publicly accessible internet address.
The contents are inline and Content Type is a OpenApi 2.0 Document.
The Open Api 2.0 document is hosted on a publicly accessible internet address.
The contents are inline and the document is a WSDL/Soap document.
The WSDL document is hosted on a publicly accessible internet address.
The contents are inline and Content Type is a OpenApi 3.0 Document in YAML format.
The contents are inline and Content Type is a OpenApi 3.0 Document in JSON format.
The Open Api 3.0 document is hosted on a publicly accessible internet address.
The Open Api 3.0 Json document is hosted on a publicly accessible internet address.

value.description: Content value when Importing an API.

wsdlSelector.description: Criteria to limit import of WSDL to a subset of the document.

wsdlEndpointName.description: Name of endpoint(port) to import from WSDL

wsdlServiceName.description: Name of service to import from WSDL

200.description: Paged Result response of diagnostics for an API.

type.description: Resource type for API Management resource.

alwaysLog.description: Specifies for what type of messages sampling settings should not apply.

values.description: Always log all erroneous request regardless of sampling settings.

backend.description: Diagnostic settings for incoming/outgoing HTTP messages to the Gateway.

bytes.description: Number of request body bytes to log.

headers.description: Array of HTTP Headers to log.

bytes.description: Number of request body bytes to log.

headers.description: Array of HTTP Headers to log.

frontend.description: Diagnostic settings for incoming/outgoing HTTP messages to the Gateway.

bytes.description: Number of request body bytes to log.

headers.description: Array of HTTP Headers to log.

bytes.description: Number of request body bytes to log.

headers.description: Array of HTTP Headers to log.

httpCorrelationProtocol.description: Sets correlation protocol to use for Application Insights diagnostics.

values.description: Do not read and inject correlation headers.
Inject Request-Id and Request-Context headers with request correlation data. See https://github.com/dotnet/corefx/blob/master/src/System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource/src/HttpCorrelationProtocol.md.
Inject Trace Context headers. See https://w3c.github.io/trace-context.

logClientIp.description: Log the ClientIP. Default is false.

loggerId.description: Resource Id of a target logger.

percentage.description: Rate of sampling for fixed-rate sampling.

values.description: Fixed-rate sampling.

verbosity.description: The verbosity level applied to traces emitted by trace policies.

values.description: All the traces emitted by trace policies will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.
Traces with 'severity' set to 'information' and 'error' will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.
Only traces with 'severity' set to 'error' will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.

default.description: Error response describing why the operation failed.

code.description: Service-defined error code. This code serves as a sub-status for the HTTP error code specified in the response.

details.description: The list of invalid fields send in request, in case of validation error.

code.description: Property level error code.

httpCorrelationProtocol.description: Sets correlation protocol to use for Application Insights diagnostics.

values.description: Do not read and inject correlation headers.
Inject Request-Id and Request-Context headers with request correlation data. See https://github.com/dotnet/corefx/blob/master/src/System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource/src/HttpCorrelationProtocol.md.
Inject Trace Context headers. See https://w3c.github.io/trace-context.

logClientIp.description: Log the ClientIP. Default is false.

loggerId.description: Resource Id of a target logger.

percentage.description: Rate of sampling for fixed-rate sampling.

values.description: Fixed-rate sampling.

verbosity.description: The verbosity level applied to traces emitted by trace policies.

values.description: All the traces emitted by trace policies will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.
Traces with 'severity' set to 'information' and 'error' will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.
Only traces with 'severity' set to 'error' will be sent to the logger attached to this diagnostic instance.
